Altera o Regulamento do Mercado de Câmbio e Capitais Internacionais (RMCCI).

Altera RMCCI 1-1; 1-8-2-8; 1-8-2-11; 1-11-1; 1-11-3; 1-11-4; 1-11-7; 1-11-8; 1-11-9-1; 1-12-4; 1-13-1; 1-16-2; 2-2; 3-2-1.
